channel.title: WebSerial on LiaScript
channel.description: Recent content in WebSerial on LiaScript

item.title: WebSerial for LiaScript: Connect Your Code Editor to Real Hardware
item.description: Bridging the gap between learning materials and real hardware is one of the hardest challenges in TVET and embedded systems education. The WebSerial template connects the LiaScript code editor directly to a microcontroller via Chrome’s Web Serial API.
